items.title: System health exposes the next recommended target start date
items.description: The latest READY snapshot health payload includes recommended_target_start_biz_date, recommendation_reason and recommendation_anchor_biz_date under history_coverage.

items.title: Recommendation distinguishes boundary gaps from out-of-coverage gaps
items.description: When corporate_action reconciliation reports boundary_gap_count > 0, the recommendation retreats from the current coverage start date; otherwise it retreats from the nearest out_of_coverage event date.

items.title: Workbench shows the next suggested history backfill target
items.description: The frontend status strip and alert summary render the current history coverage depth together with the next recommended target start date.
